---
author:
  - name: Christopher T. Kenny
    url: christophertkenny.com
    phone: "(###) ###-####"
    email: "email@harvard.edu"
    affiliations:
      - name: Harvard University
        department: Department of Government
recipient: |
  Department of Government \
  Cornell University \
  214 White Hall \
  Ithaca, NY 14853
logo: "ctk-letter/harvard-fac-trim.png"
signature: "signature.png"
signaturename: Christopher T. Kenny
signoff: "Sincerely,"
date: today
format:
  ctk-letter-typst:
    keep-typ: false
---

Dear Members of the Search Committee:

{{< lipsum 2 >}}
